description: Confirms /scrutinize v2.0 supports the flag-as-fp approval command, that flagged false positives are appended to outputs/operations/scrutiny/_fp_log.jsonl via scripts/scrutinize-flag-fp.py, and that the aggregator refreshes _fp_aggregate.md with FP rate per severity, target type, and confidence band.
input: What does the flag-as-fp command do in /scrutinize, and where does the data go?
